chunks.title: Call to Give Thanks
chunks.reason: A repeated refrain inviting different groups to acknowledge God's enduring love.

chunks.title: Personal Testimony of Deliverance
chunks.reason: A first-person narrative describing distress, divine rescue, and trust in God's power.

chunks.title: Entrance into the Temple
chunks.reason: A liturgical exchange between worshippers and priests regarding entry through the gates.

chunks.title: Processional Hymn
chunks.reason: Short petitions for salvation and blessings associated with a festival procession.

chunks.title: Final Praise
chunks.reason: A concluding declaration of gratitude that mirrors the opening verses.
